column1: # Allowed PE import DLLs for statically-linked micromamba on win-64.

column3: Advanced Windows 32 Base API (registry, services, security helpers).
Windows Cryptographic Primitives (BCrypt) used for hashing and crypto.
Crypto API32: certificates, message encoding, and related crypto services.
IP Helper API for network adapter and IP configuration queries.
Core Windows kernel base API (process, memory, files, synchronization).
OLE/COM runtime used by some Windows components and libraries.
Security Support Provider Interface (SSPI) for authentication packages.
Windows shell API (paths, shortcuts, shell folders).
Windows user-interface API (minimal use from dependencies).
LDAP client API; pulled in by libcurl when LDAP support is enabled.
Windows Sockets 2 API for TCP/UDP networking.
Lightweight streaming XML parser provided by Windows.
Universal C Runtime forwarder: string/character conversion (_wtoi, strtod, …).
UCRT forwarder: environment access (getenv, _putenv, …).
UCRT forwarder: filesystem operations (_mkdir, _unlink, …).
UCRT forwarder: heap allocation (malloc, free, calloc, …).
UCRT forwarder: locale and character classification (setlocale, …).
UCRT forwarder: floating-point math (sin, cos, pow, …).
UCRT forwarder: core C runtime startup and process control (exit, abort, …).
UCRT forwarder: standard I/O (printf, fopen, fread, …).
UCRT forwarder: C string and memory routines (strcpy, memcpy, …).
UCRT forwarder: time and date (time, localtime, strftime, …).
UCRT forwarder: utility routines (qsort, bsearch, system, …).
Microsoft C++ standard library runtime (/MD builds).
Microsoft C runtime helpers (exceptions, EH scaffolding).
Additional MSVC C++ exception-handling support on x64.
